title: AI boosts costs as pricing power lags, say Indian telcos
summary: AI is raising network costs without a corresponding increase in revenues, according to India's operators.

title: Verizon ups wireless subscriber guidance on surprise Q1 adds
summary: Verizon posted positive wireless postpaid phone net adds for the first time since 2013 as CEO Dan Schulman's plan takes shape, but January's network outage dented service revenue growth.

title: Analysts weigh what's next for cable after 'Bloody Friday'
summary: Charter's and Comcast's shares took a beating on what one analyst called 'Bloody Friday.' While the size of the sell-off might not have been warranted, it is fueling speculation about M&A and further cable sector consolidation.

title: Verizon surpasses 6M FWA subs as priority shifts to fiber
summary: Amid Verizon's expanding convergence strategy, there will be a bigger mix-shift to fiber broadband over FWA, said CEO Dan Schulman. Verizon, he added, will look to accelerate the expansion of its fiber footprint via partnerships and potential M&A.

title: Mainland China cloud infrastructure spending rises 26% in Q4 2025, driven by AI and agent growth – Omdia
summary: As enterprise AI adoption deepened, market growth was increasingly supported by private AI deployments and rising demand for cloud resources. #pressrelease

title: The only convergence lever that works is the one you buried
summary: Across nearly 1.4 million survey responses, one variable predicts wireless market share better than brand, price or network quality: whether the carrier owns the fiber under the street.

title: Telin and DITO join forces to bolster cross-border connectivity
summary: The two companies agreed to strengthen regional connectivity between the Philippines and Indonesia, underscoring their shared commitment to expanding their networks and improving their services.

title: Household gigabit subscribers to reach 60% by 2030 – Omdia
summary: Residential households subscribing to gigabit broadband will increase from about one-third in 2025 to 60% in 2030, according to Omdia analysts, putting pressure on ISPs to deliver higher speeds without compromising revenue.

title: Deutsche Telekom's love of Huawei is just one barrier to its American dream
summary: Any $260 billion deal to merge Deutsche Telekom and T-Mobile US could founder on use of Huawei, German government resistance and more.

title: SK Group enters Vietnam's AI market with data center plan
summary: The SK Group is expanding into Vietnam's AI industry ecosystem by signing an agreement to develop an AI Data Center (AIDC) in the Nghe An region.

title: Charter CEO has appetite for more cable M&A
summary: 'We'd like to acquire more cable assets if it can be done at an appropriate price [and] conditions,' said Charter CEO Chris Winfrey. Meanwhile, Charter shares are slumping amid disappointing Q1 results.

title: Midco reveals mobile pricing and packaging
summary: In the wake of market trials, Midco has introduced unlimited and by-the-Gig mobile plans in all markets. Midco Mobile, which rides the AT&T network, was developed with MVNE partner Telgoo5.

title: The Buildout: Wire 3 grows its Georgia footprint
summary: This week in broadband builds: Wire 3 invests another $37 million in Georgia; Mediacom wraps Minnesota builds; GoNetspeed grows footprint in Connecticut; Comcast connects more Missourians – and more.

title: FCC touts D2D actions
summary: The FCC said it has progressed the nascent D2D market this week by granting licenses to AST SpaceMobile and by reaffirming exclusive rights for certain D2D spectrum bands. #pressrelease

title: WBD shareholders OK Paramount Skydance deal
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) said stockholders voted to approve its pending combo with Paramount Skydance, putting it on a path for a Q3 2026 close. #pressrelease

summary: Verizon Frontline said it has rolled out a dedicated 5G network slice for compatible laptops, tablets and smartphones used by first responders. #pressrelease

summary: ACI Communications said it has integrated its new 'Infinity' amplifiers with cOS, Harmonic's virtualized access platform for HFC and FTTP networks. #pressreleaase

summary: Computing and data storage will lead all segments in semiconductor revenue growth, rising 90% year-on-year in 2026 to exceed $700bn. #pressrelease

title: Comcast shares climb amid narrowing broadband losses, record mobile gains
summary: Comcast shed a better-than-expected 65,000 broadband subs alongside a record gain of 435,000 mobile lines in Q1 thanks in part to its pivot to new pricing and packaging. A challenge ahead? Converting free mobile lines to paid.
